name: Petalis

recommended.why: Glory of the Knight increases HP and Skill Damage, allowing Petalis to strengthen her shields, healing and team-wide buffs while remaining durable enough to provide continuous support throughout battle. It is considered her best overall gear set.

alternative.why: Fury of Blood provides additional HP and Damage Reduction, making Petalis significantly harder to eliminate. It is an excellent alternative for PvP and longer fights where survivability is the priority.

investment.why: Petalis is one of the strongest Mythic support heroes in Top Heroes and a cornerstone of end-game Nature teams. Her powerful shields, healing, buffs and defensive utility provide exceptional value in both PvE and PvP, making her a top investment for Nature-focused players.

description: Petalis is a Mythic Nature support hero specializing in shielding, healing and empowering allies with powerful defensive buffs. Her exceptional utility and survivability make her a core hero in competitive Nature lineups, providing consistent protection and support throughout even the longest battles.
